puts":[],"name":"usdc","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Thin bridge contract that routes USDC to/from the Hub PrivacyPool.      Implements IMessageHandlerV2 to receive CCTP messages from Hub.      This contract does NOT hold any shielded state - all privacy pool      state is maintained on the Hub chain. This contract only:      1. Initiates cross-chain shields (burns USDC, sends to Hub)      2. Receives cross-chain unshields (receives USDC from Hub, delivers to recipient)","kind":"dev","methods":{"crossChainShield(uint256,uint256,bytes32,bytes32[3],bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Burns USDC via CCTP with hook data containing shield parameters.      The Hub will receive this message and create a commitment in its merkle tree.      Flow:      1. Transfer USDC from user to this contract      2. Approve TokenMessenger to spend USDC      3. Call depositForBurnWithHook to burn USDC and send message to Hub      4. Hub receives message, processes shield, adds commitment to tree","params":{"amount":"Amount of USDC to shield","destinationCaller":"Address allowed to call receiveMessage on Hub (bytes32).        Use bytes32(0) to allow any relayer, or specify a relayer address for MEV protection.","encryptedBundle":"Encrypted note data [3 x bytes32]","maxFee":"Maximum CCTP relayer fee (deducted at protocol level, 0 = no fee)","npk":"Note public key (recipient's key for claiming the note)","shieldKey":"Shield key for decryption by recipient"},"returns":{"_0":"nonce CCTP message nonce"}},"handleReceiveFinalizedMessage(uint32,bytes32,uint32,bytes)":{"details":"Called by TokenMessenger after CCTP attestation is verified and tokens minted.      USDC has already been minted to this contract by CCTP.      We decode the message and forward USDC to the final recipient.      Message format: BurnMessageV2 (see ICCTPV2.sol for byte layout)      - amount: Gross amount before fee deduction      - feeExecuted: Fee deducted (actualMint = amount - feeExecuted)      - hookData: tensions/IERC20Permit.sol":{"keccak256":"0xb264c03a3442eb37a68ad620cefd1182766b58bee6cec40343480392d6b14d69","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://28879d01fd22c07b44f006612775f8577defbe459cb01685c5e25cd518c91a71","dweb:/ipfs/QmVgfkwv2Fxw6hhTcDUZhE7NkoSKjab3ipM7UaRbt6uXb5"]},"node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0xabefac93435967b4d36a4fabcbdbb918d1f0b7ae3c3d85bc30923b326c927ed1","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9d213d3befca47da33f6db0310826bcdb148299805c10d77175ecfe1d06a9a68","dweb:/ipfs/QmRgCn6SP1hbBkExUADFuDo8xkT4UU47yjNF5FhCeRbQmS"]},"node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/Address.sol":{"keccak256":"0x006dd67219697fe68d7fbfdea512e7c4cb64a43565ed86171d67e844982da6fa","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://2455248c8ddd9cc6a7af76a13973cddf222072427e7b0e2a7d1aff345145e931","dweb:/ipfs/QmfYjnjRbWqYpuxurqveE6HtzsY1Xx323J428AKQgtBJZm"]}},"version":1}

crossChainShield(uint256,uint256,bytes32.details: Burns USDC via CCTP with hook data containing shield parameters.      The Hub will receive this message and create a commitment in its merkle tree.      Flow:      1. Transfer USDC from user to this contract      2. Approve TokenMessenger to spend USDC      3. Call depositForBurnWithHook to burn USDC and send message to Hub      4. Hub receives message, processes shield, adds commitment to tree

params.destinationCaller: Address allowed to call receiveMessage on Hub (bytes32).        Use bytes32(0) to allow any relayer, or specify a relayer address for MEV protection.
params.maxFee: Maximum CCTP relayer fee (deducted at protocol level, 0 = no fee)
params.npk: Note public key (recipient's key for claiming the note)
params.shieldKey: Shield key for decryption by recipient

handleReceiveFinalizedMessage(uint32,byt.details: Called by TokenMessenger after CCTP attestation is verified and tokens minted.      USDC has already been minted to this contract by CCTP.      We decode the message and forward USDC to the final recipient.      Message format: BurnMessageV2 (see ICCTPV2.sol for byte layout)      - amount: Gross amount before fee deduction      - feeExecuted: Fee deducted (actualMint = amount - feeExecuted)      - hookData: Our CCTPPayload with unshield data

params.finalityThresholdExecuted: The finality threshold that was met (>=2000 for finalized)
params.sender: Sender address on source chain (as bytes32, typically remote TokenMessenger)

returns._0: success Always returns true on success (reverts on failure)

handleReceiveUnfinalizedMessage(uint32,b.details: We don't support fast finality in the POC

crossChainShield(uint256,uint256,bytes32.notice: Initiate a cross-chain shield to the Hub

handleReceiveFinalizedMessage(uint32,byt.notice: Handle finalized CCTP message (cross-chain unshields from Hub)

hubPool().notice: Hub PrivacyPool address (as bytes32 for CCTP compatibility)

initialized().notice: Whether the contract has been initialized
